description:
Fast cross-device file explorer with VPS + LAN peer access

LinkDrive is a fast file explorer for Windows with first-class SFTP / VPS browsing,
multi-select transfers with cancel/resume, folder mirroring, bookmarks, SSH config
import, and Tailscale peer discovery.
See https://github.com/MoltenPixelStudio/linkdrive/releases/tag/v0.2.0
